final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: documentary aerial photography, environmental editorial
Primary request: aerial view of the boundary between Amazon rainforest and modern agricultural development zone
Scene/backdrop: high-altitude perspective showing the stark contrast between untouched jungle and farmland extending to horizon, with a dirt road winding through
Subject: left side shows dense virgin tropical rainforest with layered canopy and emergent Brazil nut trees; right side shows geometric soybean fields in varying growth stages from fresh green to dry yellow; clear boundary with charred black soil and felled trees; red dust rising from trucks on the dirt road
Style/medium: documentary photography, photojournalistic aerial survey
Composition/framing: top-down aerial view, wide establishing shot, drone perspective
Lighting/mood: natural daylight, clear atmospheric conditions, somber and thought-provoking mood highlighting environmental tension
Color palette: deep forest greens + fresh and dry crop yellows + burnt black + reddish-brown earth tones + pale sky blue
Materials/textures: dense irregular tree canopy texture, geometric crop field patterns, rough charred earth, fine red dust particles
Constraints: maintain the stark contrast between natural forest and agricultural development as the central visual narrative
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial-looking boundaries, cartoonish rendering, watermark, text overlay
